quotes: The greatest sin is to think yourself weak. ~Swami Vivekananda
Do not learn how to react, learn how to respond. ~Buddha

You could be good today, instead you choose tomorrow. 
~ Marcus Aurileus

What are you afraid of losing, when nothing in the world actually belongs to you.
~Marcus aurileus

The more pleasure we seek, the less happy we become.
~Marcus aurileus

It is not the darkness around you that consumes you, but the one you carry inside. 
~ some great man

It's not who you are underneath it's what you do that defines you. 
~ Batman

Anything that makes you weak, physically, intellectually, spiritually, reject it as poision.
~ Swami Vivekananda

The calmer you are the clearer your think, let your thoughts come from a place of peace not from a place of reaction.
~ Some great man

The nearer the man comes to a calm mind, the closer he is to strength.
~ Marcus Aurileus

Philosophy is Questions that may never be answered, Religion is Answers that never be questioned.
~ the cost of belief.

"Don't dwell on who you were, past mistakes, or regrets. They only bring negativity. Focus on improving today and shaping a better future." 
~ A friend

"If you are depressed, you are living in the past. If you are anxious, you are living in the future. If you are at peace, you are living in the present." 
~ The art of war.

We all have secrets, the ones we keep and the ones that are kept from us.
~ Peter Parker, Amazing spiderman.
Trying to prove you are the greatest is an insult.
It's crazy how some people need no proof to believe a lie, but demand endless proof to accept the truth.

EVERYONE HAS A PART OF THEMSELVES THEY HIDE. EVEN FROM THE PEOPLE, THEY LOVE MOST.
~Ben parker, the amazing Spider-Man.
When God became lonely he created man, or was it when man became lonely he created God.
Honesty with kindness is brutality &  Kindness without honesty is manipulation.

You need Power, only when you want to do something harmful otherwise. Love is enough to get everything done.
~ Charlie chaplin

It's not my circus, not my monkeys.
~ Polish saying.
If something doesn't grow, it rots.
A lion doesn't consern with the opinions of a sheep.
